mapper.sql: id, user_id, app_id, scopes, expires_at, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by, revoked_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_user_authorization_t WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND app_id = #{appId} AND revoked_at IS NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_user_authorization_t SET revoked_at = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND revoked_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_user_authorization_t WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW(3)) ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_user_authorization_t WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND app_id = #{appId} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW(3)) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
